posts.text:
As the Iran War nears its one-month mark, I will be joining Charles Payne, @cvpayne, on Fox Business today at 2:25 PM ET.

Our "Conflict Playbook" is nearing Step #9 and we continue to navigate this period of historic uncertainty.

I will be discussing @KobeissiLetter's outlook on equities, commodities, and bonds.

Tune in LIVE at 2:25 PM ET to hear our thoughts.

posts.text:
Modern education systems prioritize creating followers because the industrial-era "factory model" favors standardized obedience and predictable labor over the disruptive, individualistic nature of leadership.

Educate yourself to go where you want to go.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
